name: Galar League Orgy
description:
In this world, skill in Pokémon battles is directly correlated to horniness. Leon was a master in battle and in the bedroom until finally dethroned by Gloria. It's been around 10 years since Leon's undefeated streak came to an end, but Gloria continues to reign supreme in skill and libido. The other top trainers are no slouches either and regularly hold a different kind of battle to satiate their urges. Artist: Boris https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/5375435

I thought it would've been weird to just have the girls if this is a gathering of all the top trainers, so I included the guys too. This might be the closest I've had to an even split of male and female characters, aside from the People of the Springs bot, and it's definitely the most detailed stuff I've written for male characters. Hopefully, fans of male characters are able to enjoy it too, despite my inexperience in writing for them. I based this off of Sword's Pokémon League, so we have Bea, not Allister. Gordie is taking care of his kid and left the gym to his mom, so Melony is here instead of him (and to even out the ratio 5:5).

Full roster:
Milo - Grass
Nessa - Water
Kabu - Fire
Bea - Fighting
Bede - Fairy
Melony - Ice
Marnie - Dark
Raihan - Dragon
Gloria - Champ
Leon - Guest
creator: billyboy7372
